title: Governance integrity hardening
objective: Block repository escapes, preserve 1000+ observations, serialize Run/Trace updates, and align product contracts
problem: Three executable integrity defects and three documented contract drifts remain after the autonomy phase
implementationSteps: Add canonical repository-relative containment and hook denial
Generalize sequential ID parsing and add per-record locks
Clarify enforceable Contract fields and align RunState SSOT
Add boundary, concurrency, and dogfood regression tests
testStrategy: Targeted boundary/concurrency tests followed by typecheck, full suite, coverage, and pack audit
definitionOfDone: All seven Intent DoD items are evidenced
risks: Cross-process lock stale recovery must not deadlock
Historical phase documents must remain historical
